summary: Inventory management project with Axle integration. Features include adding and uploading items to inventory. Latest adjustment: when uploading from Axle, the ID column acts as the key while other columns follow changes made in Axle.
architectural_notes: Axle upload uses ID column as primary key; other columns follow Axle data changes

existing_features.title: When importing inventory items from an Axle-exported Excel file, use the ID column as the unique key: if an item with the same ID already exists in inventory, update all other columns (name, price, stock, category, etc.) with the values from the uploaded file; if no matching ID exists, insert it as a new item.

new_feature_requests.summary: When uploading from Axle, use ID column as the key so other columns are updated/overwritten by changes from Axle
